titles.title: Providing for consideration of the bill (H.R. 7007) to govern on behalf of the American people.
Providing for consideration of the bill (H.R. 7007) to govern on behalf of the American people.

action.text: Referred to the House Committee on Rules.
Motion to Discharge Committee filed by Mr. Raskin. Petition No: 119-24.

bill.summary: This resolution provides for the consideration of the bill (H.R. 7007) to govern on behalf of the American people.
